backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Product and Testimonial modules with CRUD operations, category filtering, featured products, newsletter subscriptions, and user-specific favorites management using Maps, Sets, and Lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hero banner, featured products, testimonials, newsletter, shop page, category pages, about, contact) to their source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, layout, navigation, pages (home, shop, categories, about, contact), product cards, React Query hooks, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH-based color variables for light and dark modes, defining neutral palette (beige, white, brown, grey, black) for premium furniture aesthetic.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title 'coozy home Furniture', and script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining routes for home, shop, category pages (living room, bedroom, office), about, and contact, all wrapped in Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, navigation links in columns (Shop, Company, Contact), copyright notice, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper providing consistent structure with Navigation header, main content area with Outlet for route rendering, and Footer across all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, desktop menu featuring Shop dropdown with category links, mobile hamburger menu, and hover/click state management.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: React component that displays a product card with image, name, description, and price, featuring hover effects for scale and color transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state using @dfinity/auth-client, with support for delegation identity validation and configurable auth options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching featured products, products by category, testimonials, and handling newsletter subscriptions using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens defining a neutral beige/brown color palette for light and dark themes, plus base typography styles using Inter font.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying brand story, mission, vision, and sustainability values with hero banner and multi-section layout.
frontend/src/pages/Bedroom.tsx: Category page component that fetches and displays bedroom products in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form for user messages and contact information display, including simulated form submission with success/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring hero banner, featured products grid, value propositions section, customer testimonials, and newsletter subscription form with email validation and success/error states.
frontend/src/pages/LivingRoom.tsx: Living room category page displaying products filtered by Category.livingRoom with a banner header and responsive product grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Office.tsx: Office furniture category page displaying products filtered by Category.office with a banner header and responsive product grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Shop.tsx: Shop page with category filter buttons (all, living room, bedroom, office, dining) that displays filtered products in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended spacing/shadows, Inter font family, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining the furniture e-commerce site architecture with neutral color palette, minimal design aesthetic, image requirements for products/banners, and completed feature list.
